creator: jpb@jimby.name
text:
(In reply to Jim B. from comment #3)

I've prepared a section for the FDP Primer dealing with managing contributor lists.  The "In Memoriam" section is part of the FreeBSD Developers list.

See https://reviews.freebsd.org/D49185

There is a procedure in there for notifying the community when a FreeBSD developer (or any team member) passes away.

Once that is committed, I have a patch for putting Hans Petter Selasky into "In Memoriam" ready to go.

Still waiting to hear about Mike Karels.
